analysis.consistency_check: The entry is internally consistent. Spell details (level, school, casting time, components, classes) align with typical D&D 5e spell structures.
analysis.quality_assessment: High quality. The description is detailed, clearly outlines limitations (material type, size restrictions, excluded items like creatures/magic items, craftsmanship prerequisites), and provides illustrative examples.
analysis.mechanical_impact: This is a powerful utility/creation spell, especially for non-magical construction and resource manipulation. The key mechanical constraints are the cube limits (10ft for general, 5ft for stone/metal) and the proficiency requirement for complex items. The 10-minute casting time makes it situational for combat but excellent for downtime or mission support.
